items.title: Top Stock Reports for IBM, Micron & Abbott
items.description: IBM posts strong Q3 results as Watsonx and quantum bets boost growth, while Micron rides AI-driven memory demand and Abbott expands on device strength.

items.title: This Canadian Electronics Stock Keeps Surging On AI Spend
items.description: Canadian electronics manufacturer Celestica kept rising Wednesday after an exceptional earnings report earlier this week.  On Wednesday Celestica stock jumped 3.5%.  In the third quarter, it outperformed analyst expectations across the board.

items.title: International Business Machines Corp. stock underperforms Wednesday when compared to competitors
items.description: International Business Machines Corp. stock underperforms Wednesday when compared to competitors

items.title: Seagate's Q1 Earnings & Sales Top, Product Uptake & Pricing Lift Margins
items.description: STX's strong fiscal Q1 2026 results, powered by cloud demand and Mozaic HAMR drive growth, set the stage for higher revenue and margins ahead.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Rises Ahead Of Fed Rate Decision, Powell; Nvidia Surges To New Highs (Live Coverage)
items.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index rose Wednesday ahead of the Fed decision and Powell. Nvidia stock surged to new highs.
